transcript:
Agent: Pain Management and Neurology, this is Kevin.
Caller: Hi, I'm calling about my mother's appointment. She's Rosa Gutierrez, and she had a visit last week. I want to know what medication the doctor prescribed for her.
Agent: Let me pull up her file. What's her date of birth?
Caller: September 5, 1958.
Agent: Okay, I see her file. So the doctor prescribed her gabapentin 300mg, three times a day. She also had a nerve block procedure done.
Caller: Oh okay. And what about that other patient who was in the room before her? My mom said he seemed to be in a lot of pain.
Agent: Yeah, that was Mr. Davis. He's been coming in for his herniated disc treatments. He's on a pretty heavy pain management regimen. Anyway, back to your mother —
Caller: Wait, I also wanted to ask about her MRI results. Can you tell me what they showed?
Agent: Look, I already gave you the medication info. I can't keep going back and forth on every little thing. You need to make an appointment to discuss results with the doctor. I don't have all day for this.
Caller: I'm sorry, I just had a few questions —
Agent: You should come in person if you have that many questions. Is there anything else?
Caller: No... I guess that's it.
Agent: Alright, bye.
